title: 1D Comfort Food — Вкус и привлекательность еды

items.example: Chocolate has always been seen as a treat, especially for children.
Chocolate is the comfort food of choice for so many people.
As a self-confessed chocoholic, I eat chocolate every single day.
I had a sudden craving for something sweet and rich.
At weekends I like to indulge in a big piece of chocolate cake.
Sweet foods are naturally appealing to most people.
Chocolate contains chemicals that stimulate the brain and give us energy.
The chocolate has a delicious creamy texture that melts on the tongue.
Dark chocolate is quite bitter because it has less sugar.
High-quality chocolate should melt on the tongue slowly.
